creator: the_mix_room@hotmail.com
text:
I am having the same problem. 

On Machine A it does not build with clang, but does with gcc

FreeBSD $HOSTNAME-MACHINEA 9.0-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE-p3 #0: Tue Jun 12 02:52:29 UTC 2012     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

On Machine B it builds with clang. 

FreeBSD $HOSTNAME-MACHINEB 9.0-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE-p3 #0: Tue Jun 12 02:52:29 UTC 2012     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

I have HAVE_AVX=0 in config.h

I would really like to build the new version of mplayer on MachineA, so I am happy to help localize the problem, but would need some hints at where to look. 


 		 	   		  =
